errors.credits_must_be_positive: Credits to use must be greater than 0.
errors.invalid_order_total: Order total must be greater than 0.
errors.credits_decimal_precision: Credits must have at most 2 decimal places.
errors.credits_exceed_max: Credits to use exceed the per-redemption maximum.
errors.self_redemption_forbidden: You cannot redeem credits at your own listing.
errors.programme_unavailable: The loyalty programme is not available on this community.
errors.merchant_disabled: This merchant is no longer accepting time credits.
errors.merchant_misconfigured: This merchant's loyalty configuration is invalid.
errors.exceeds_max_discount: Discount exceeds the maximum allowed for this order.
errors.zero_balance: You have no time credits to redeem.
errors.insufficient_credits: Not enough time credits in your wallet.
errors.redemption_not_reversible: Only applied redemptions can be reversed.
errors.reversal_reason_too_long: Reversal reason must be 500 characters or fewer.
errors.invalid_exchange_rate: CHF per hour must be between 0 and 9999.
errors.invalid_max_discount_pct: Max discount percent must be between 0 and 100.

sub_region_demand.title: Sub-region coverage
sub_region_demand.description: Hours requested vs. fulfilled per sub-region. Coverage below 50% is flagged.

helper_churn.title: Helper churn
helper_churn.description: Share of previously active helpers who have not logged hours in the last 30 days.

coefficient_drift.title: Category coefficient drift
coefficient_drift.description: Observed average hours per session compared to the admin-set baseline. Drift above 15% is flagged.

helper_at_risk.message: We have missed you lately. Would you like a warmth pass with a fellow helper?

unfulfilled_help_request.message: :name's help request has been waiting more than :days days. Could we widen the search?

low_coverage_subregion.message: :name is under-supplied right now. Consider recruiting more helpers there.

alerts.recipients_without_tandem_message: These members received help in the last six months but have no active recurring tandem. Pair them with a steady supporter to lock in continuity.
alerts.inactive_members_message: Members who logged hours in the last six months but nothing in the last 30 days. A friendly check-in often re-engages them.
alerts.overdue_reviews_message: Pending vol logs older than :sla days. Approve or escalate them so members get credited.
alerts.coordinators_overloaded_message: One or more coordinators have more than 10 pending reviews assigned. Reassign before bottlenecks form.
alerts.overdue_check_ins_message: Active recurring relationships whose scheduled check-in has passed. Reach out to confirm both sides are still well.
alerts.low_supply_message: Categories where active requests outnumber available offers. Worth highlighting to potential supporters.

civic_digest.cadence_invalid: cadence must be one of: off, daily, weekly
civic_digest.preferred_sub_region_invalid: preferred_sub_region_id must be numeric or null
civic_digest.opt_out_sources_invalid: opt_out_sources must be an array of source keys

readiness.owner_too_long: Owner must be 255 characters or fewer
readiness.notes_too_long: Notes must be 2000 characters or fewer
readiness.url_invalid: Value must be a valid URL
readiness.url_too_long: URL must be 1000 characters or fewer
readiness.value_too_long: Value must be 1000 characters or fewer

data_quality.missing_language_positive: These members will receive emails and notifications in the platform default. Set their preferred language for proper localisation.
data_quality.missing_language_ok: Every member has a preferred language set.
data_quality.no_sub_region_column: No users.sub_region_id column on this schema. Sub-region linkage is tracked elsewhere.
data_quality.no_sub_regions: No sub-regions defined for this tenant. Skipping check.
data_quality.no_coordinator_column: No coordinator column on this schema.
